items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Lead Mobile Engineer to build and grow our mobile engineering practice. You will architect and develop our iOS and Android applications while establishing the technical foundations, patterns, and best practices for mobile development across the company.

This is a player-coach role where you will write code daily while also mentoring a small but growing team of mobile engineers. You will have significant influence on our mobile technology choices and product direction.

Responsibilities

  • Architect and build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native or native technologies
  • Define the mobile technical roadmap, coding standards, and CI/CD pipeline
  • Mentor and grow a team of 3-5 mobile engineers through code reviews and pairing sessions
  • Collaborate with product and design to define mobile-specific features and interactions
  • Optimize app performance, startup time, and battery consumption
  • Manage app store submissions, releases, and over-the-air updates

Requirements

  • 7+ years of mobile development experience with at least 2 years in a lead or staff role
  • Deep expertise in React Native or both Swift and Kotlin
  • Strong understanding of mobile architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture)
  • Experience with mobile CI/CD, testing frameworks, and app distribution
  • Track record of shipping and maintaining production mobile applications

Nice to Have

  • Experience with native module development bridging React Native and platform APIs
  • Knowledge of mobile security best practices and encrypted storage
  • Experience with GraphQL subscriptions or real-time mobile features
